---
title: "lemuel-quant-core — Daily Market Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
params:
  symbols: ["btcusdt", "ethusdt", "005930"]
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  library(scales)
  library(knitr)
  library(xts)
})
# LQC_REPO 가 있으면 그 경로 기준, 아니면 /opt/lqc/lemuel-quant-core 기본값.
lqc_repo <- Sys.getenv("LQC_REPO", unset = "/opt/lqc/lemuel-quant-core")
source(file.path(lqc_repo, "r", "common", "r2.R"))
source(file.path(lqc_repo, "r", "common", "db.R"))

today <- Sys.Date()
yesterday <- today - 1
```

# 시장 요약 (`r format(today)`)

## 오늘의 변동성

```{r vol-table}
symbols <- params$symbols
vol_rows <- lapply(symbols, function(s) {
  trades <- tryCatch(r2_load_trades(s), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(trades) || !nrow(trades)) return(NULL)
  prices <- xts::xts(trades[["val.price"]], order.by = trades$ts)
  rets <- na.omit(diff(log(prices)))
  if (!length(rets)) return(NULL)
  data.frame(
    symbol = s,
    last_price = round(as.numeric(tail(prices, 1)), 4),
    intraday_return_pct = round(100 * (as.numeric(tail(prices, 1)) /
      as.numeric(prices[1]) - 1), 2),
    realized_vol_pct = round(100 * sqrt(252) * sd(as.numeric(rets)), 2)
  )
})
vol_tbl <- do.call(rbind, Filter(Negate(is.null), vol_rows))
knitr::kable(vol_tbl, caption = "Symbol summary")
```

## 가격 차트

```{r price-charts, fig.width=9, fig.height=3, results="asis"}
for (s in symbols) {
  trades <- tryCatch(r2_load_trades(s), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(trades) || !nrow(trades)) next
  cat("###", s, "\n\n")
  p <- ggplot(trades, aes(x = ts, y = `val.price`)) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(title = paste(s, "intraday"), x = NULL, y = "price") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
    theme_minimal()
  print(p)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

# 공시 (DART)

```{r dart-recent}
dsn <- Sys.getenv("LQC_PG_DSN")
if (nzchar(dsn)) {
  result <- tryCatch({
    con <- pg_connect(dsn)
    on.exit(DBI::dbDisconnect(con), add = TRUE)
    dart_recent(con, limit = 30)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("PostgreSQL 연결 실패:", conditionMessage(e))
    NULL
  })
  if (!is.null(result) && nrow(result)) {
    knitr::kable(result, caption = "최근 30개 공시")
  } else if (!is.null(result)) {
    cat("(공시 데이터 없음)")
  }
} else {
  cat("LQC_PG_DSN 미설정 — DART 섹션 생략")
}
```

# 뉴스 시그널 (지난 24h)

```{r news-section}
cat("news-pipeline 의 score 출력은 stdout/journal 에 있음. ",
    "추후 Redis publish 추가 시 이 섹션에 자동 표시.\n")
```

---

*Generated by lemuel-quant-core / r/daily_report at `r format(Sys.time())`*
